title: 25L 25 Litre Small Eco-Friendly Recycled Flexi Tub - Dark Green - Multi Purpose Robust Flexible Storage Container Bucket, Single Bucket.
features: You’ll wonder how you ever coped without our multi-purpose 25L Flexi Tub, available in a wide selection of vibrant colours.

This handy yet durable tub is suitable for a wide range of home, garden, school, office or industrial uses such as storage containers, toy tubs, laundry baskets, garden waste, washing cars or mixing plaster.
It is manufactured from heavy duty RECYCLED polyethylene materials and boasts a flexible shatter-proof construction adding to its versatility, multipurpose and eco-friendly credentials.
This is a smaller compact flexi tub with a 25Litre capacity and a stackable design for easy storage. Features strong integrated carry handles suitable for carrying heavy loads.
Available individually or sold in great value multi buy sets of 3, 5 or 10 Flexi Tubs. Dimensions: 32.5cm (H) x 42cm (W) x 38cm (D)
